exercises.code:
# agentic_I2 skeptic-crosscheck · S13-T1-A-E2
def blocking_key(rec):
    parts = rec["name"].casefold().split()
    ap = parts[1] if len(parts) >= 2 else parts[0]
    return f"{ap}|{rec['area'].casefold()}"
print(blocking_key({"name": "Luis Huamán Soto", "area": "Cusco"}))

exercises.code:
# agentic_I2 skeptic-crosscheck · S13-T1-B-E2
pairs = [
    {"id": "P1", "score": 0.2},
    {"id": "P2", "score": 0.55},
    {"id": "P3", "score": 0.7},
    {"id": "P4", "score": 0.9},
]
def clerical_queue(pairs, low=0.4, high=0.7):
    return [p["id"] for p in pairs if low <= p["score"] <= high]
print(clerical_queue(pairs))

exercises.code:
# agentic_I2 skeptic-crosscheck · S13-T2-B-E1
ops = [("A","B",10), ("C","D",1), ("B","A",5)]
def direct_txs(ops, a, b):
    return [m for x, y, m in ops if {x, y} == {a, b}]
print(direct_txs(ops, "A", "B"))

        f"entity_resolution_score={er}",
        f"relationship_signal_score={rel}",
        f"missing={missing}",

exercises.code:
# agentic_I2 skeptic-crosscheck · S13-T3-A-E2
def uncertainty_band(missing, conflict):
    if conflict or len(missing) >= 2:
        return "high"
    if missing:
        return "med"
    return "low"
print(uncertainty_band([], False))
print(uncertainty_band(["email"], False))
print(uncertainty_band(["email", "phone"], False))
print(uncertainty_band([], True))

exercises.code:
# agentic_I2 skeptic-crosscheck · S13-T3-A-E3
er, rel = 0.9, 0.1
score = round(0.6 * er + 0.4 * rel, 3)
conflict = abs(er - rel) > 0.5
print("evidence_score", score)
print("uncertainty", "high" if conflict else "low")
print("note", "señales conflictivas")

selfcheck.chosen_text: Mantenerse separados en la ficha de caso
selfcheck.justification_from_packet: Skeptic S13 Q0: contrasté las 4 opciones del selfCheck_stems contra theory/iDo. Descarté distractores que no aparecen como práctica recomendada. Me quedo con índice 0: «Mantenerse separados en la ficha de caso» porque responde «entity_resolution_score y relationship_signal_score deben…» con el vocabulario del paquete activo (sin mirar correctIndex).

selfcheck.chosen_text: Error de matching; no es veredicto legal de fraude

Me quedo con índice 3: «Encolar needs_review / abstenerse según política» porque responde «En zona gris de score el sistema debe…» con el vocabulario del paquete activo (sin mirar correctIndex).
